canonical_frame.coordinate_notes: HRA organ vertices are already registered in the shared female-body frame. Preserve their coordinates and do not independently recenter organ meshes. The extracted united-body POSITION extent is 0.967442058 x 1.666348242 x 0.455284934 meters.
canonical_frame.source: Human Reference Atlas female united body v1.5
canonical_frame.subject: Visible Human Female

bodyparts3d.legacy_embedded_notice: The OBJ header still states CC Attribution-ShareAlike 2.1 Japan. Retain that embedded notice and attribution unless legal review confirms the 2025 CC BY 4.0 relicensing supersedes it for this archived mesh.
bodyparts3d.required_attribution: BodyParts3D © The Database Center for Life Science licensed under CC Attribution 4.0 International

manifest_metadata.purpose: Official medical 3D references for measurement and procedural reconstruction; not runtime assets.

manifest_metadata.coordinate_notes: BodyParts3D frame: +X anatomical left, -X right, +Y posterior, -Y anterior, +Z superior; all body-part Z values are positive. This male stomach is a secondary morphology reference and must not be directly registered into the HRA female frame.
